use_cases: Selecting between camping experience options for travel bookings
Displaying product or service variations with imagery and descriptions
Creating interactive feature showcases for outdoor/hospitality websites
Enabling users to browse through different experience options with smooth transitions
Serving as a visual navigation component for recreation and tourism platforms
ai_summary: An interactive selector component that allows users to browse through camping and outdoor experience options. Features staggered entrance animations, click-based selection with smooth transitions, and displays full imagery, icons, titles, and descriptions for each option. Designed for showcasing travel, recreation, and hospitality selections with a modern minimalist aesthetic.
